viral_business.headline: Ground Zero to Industry Leader: How WITO Technology's CEO Is Powering Malaysia's SME Digital Revolution
viral_business.chatbot_connection: SME digital revolution starts with simple automation - chatbots are the easiest first step for Malaysian SMEs to go digital without massive IT investment

selected_angle: SME digital revolution through accessible AI - from Hartamas Real Estate's AI deployment to WITO Technology's SME empowerment

facebook_post.content:
🇲🇾 BIG NEWS: Malaysia's SME digital revolution is HERE!

Just this week:
✅ Hartamas Real Estate partnered UCAN Technologies to deploy AI in property sales
✅ WITO Technology's CEO shares how they went from 'Ground Zero to Industry Leader' powering MY SME digital revolution (Malaysiakini)
✅ FutureCFO reports: Malaysia's CFOs are navigating AI transformation from legacy to leadership

Boss, you still manually reply customer WhatsApp at 10PM? 😅

At [Your AI Chatbot Solutions], we make AI accessible for EVERY Malaysian SME:

💰 **Finance teams** - Chatbots handle invoice queries & payment reminders instantly (CFO-approved!)
🏠 **Sales teams** - Like Hartamas Real Estate, chatbots qualify leads & schedule appointments 24/7
📱 **WhatsApp integration** - 88% of Malaysians use it daily, meet customers where they are
✅ **PDPA compliant** - Your customer data protected by Malaysian law

WITO Technology proved: Digital revolution doesn't need massive IT budget. Start with a chatbot. Transform your business.

📱 WhatsApp us NOW: +60 12-345 6789 for FREE demo!

#SMEdigitalMY #AIchatbotMY #HartamasRealEstate #WITOtechnology #PDPAcompliant #WhatsAppBusiness #MalaysiaBiz #DigitalTransformation
facebook_post.cta: WhatsApp us NOW: +60 12-345 6789 for FREE demo!
facebook_post.compliance_notes: PDPA compliance explicitly mentioned; all examples are Malaysia-specific SMEs; WhatsApp integration highlighted

z_image_prompts.prompt: Modern Malaysian SME office with diverse team celebrating digital success, laptops showing AI chatbot dashboard, Hartamas Real Estate-style property listings on screens, warm lighting, Kuala Lumpur skyline visible through large windows, professional corporate photography, high detail, 8K resolution, vibrant colors representing digital transformation
z_image_prompts.style_notes: Optimized for Z-Image/Tongyi-MAI - high-fidelity natural language prompt with specific Malaysian SME context

z_image_prompts.prompt: Clean infographic with Malaysian flag colors, CFO silhouette with chatbot icon, text 'Invoice Queries? Payment Reminders? Chatbot handles it 24/7' in English and Bahasa Malaysia, dark blue gradient background with financial charts subtle overlay, professional vector illustration style
z_image_prompts.style_notes: Dark theme preferred per user's design preferences, finance automation angle

z_image_prompts.prompt: Hartamas Real Estate-style property showcase with chatbot interface overlay on smartphone, Malaysian property agent discussing with client, modern condo showroom background, WhatsApp chat bubbles showing lead qualification, bright professional lighting, photorealistic style
z_image_prompts.style_notes: Sales automation highlight with local real estate context

z_image_prompts.prompt: WITO Technology-inspired success visual, Malaysian SME owner from ground zero to industry leader, split screen showing 'Before: Manual processes' vs 'After: AI chatbot automation', happy customers on smartphones, warm inspiring tone, professional portrait photography
z_image_prompts.style_notes: Viral business story angle, SME empowerment theme

video_production.safety_mode: Strict (euphemism replacement for Vertex AI filters)

production_table.audio: Boss, you heard? Hartamas Real Estate dah guna AI untuk jual rumah! (Pattern interrupt - local success story)
production_table.z_image_prompt: Close-up of surprised Malaysian SME owner reading news on smartphone, Hartamas Real Estate logo visible, modern office background, dramatic lighting
production_table.video_motion_prompt: Camera quickly zooms in on smartphone screen showing news article, owner's eyes widen

production_table.audio: Dari property sales sampai finance invoicing - AI chatbot boleh automate semua! 24/7, PDPA compliant tau. Macam WITO Technology kata: 'Digital revolution starts simple'.
production_table.z_image_prompt: Split screen showing diverse Malaysian professionals: property agent with chatbot on phone, CFO reviewing automated reports, warm office lighting, success imagery
production_table.video_motion_prompt: Smooth transition between professions, chat bubbles and financial charts animate in, green checkmarks appear

production_table.audio: Customer WhatsApp tanya harga? Chatbot jawab terus. Invoice query? Chatbot settle dalam 2 saat. You tidur, chatbot kerja!
production_table.z_image_prompt: Malaysian business owner sleeping peacefully at home, smartphone glowing with WhatsApp notifications being answered by chatbot, peaceful night scene with KL city lights, warm colors
production_table.video_motion_prompt: Owner sleeps while phone lights up with automated replies, smooth time-lapse effect on notifications

production_table.audio: Join Hartamas, WITO Technology - automate your SME with AI chatbot. WhatsApp: +60 12-345 6789. Free demo untuk 10 syarikat pertama!
production_table.z_image_prompt: Confident Malaysian SME owner pointing to camera, WhatsApp number highlighted in neon glow, '10 slots left' counter animating down, professional corporate portrait with KL skyline
production_table.video_motion_prompt: Owner gives thumbs up, WhatsApp number flies in with animation, counter ticks down dramatically

production_table.audio: AI Chatbot Malaysia - SME Digital Revolution. (Logo animation with 'Ground Zero to Industry Leader' tagline)
production_table.z_image_prompt: Company logo centered on dark blue gradient with Malaysian flag subtle pattern and 'SME Digital Revolution' text, professional branding
production_table.video_motion_prompt: Logo animates in with glow effect, tagline fades in below, smooth fade out with success imagery

video_production.loop_structure: Hook (local success story - Hartamas) → Solution (AI chatbot for all verticals) → Social proof (WITO Technology) → Benefit (work while you sleep) → Offer (10 free demos) → Brand recall
